positive: A mystical, bioluminescent forest scene viewed through a dramatic portal. The central element is a highly detailed, stylized nocturnal creature (e.g., a glowing fox or winged lynx) in a powerful, elegant silhouette, amidst massive, stylized flora that glow with neon blues, vibrant magentas, and electric cyan. Composition must be symmetrical and highly contained, optimizing for textile repeat. Utilize strong edge lighting and deep contrast (chiaroscuro effect) to make the silhouette pop against the glowing background. The style should be a blend of Neo-Art Nouveau and high-contrast graphic illustration, suitable for a detailed t-shirt print. Clean lines, solid color areas, visible textures, minimal gradient noise. Vector graphic quality, 8k, cinematic lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noisy, ugly, faded, sketch, photorealistic, CGI, muted colors
